### Pre-Event Tasks
*   **Venue Selection & Technical Setup:** Secure a reliable video conferencing platform and confirm speaker technical requirements well in advance.
*   **Registration Management:** Open registration portals and manage attendee credentials to ensure smooth check-in on the day of the event.
*   **Marketing Promotion:** Share teasers and agendas to build anticipation and drive ticket sales or sign-ups.

### Live Event Tasks
*   **Technical Support Team:** Establish a dedicated support channel to handle audio, video, and connectivity issues for participants.
*   **Moderator Coordination:** Ensure each session starts and ends on time with proper transitions between speakers.
*   **On-Screen Logistics:** Monitor the dashboard closely to manage room settings, screen sharing permissions, and Q&A moderation tools efficiently throughout the broadcasts.
*   **Real-Time Engagement:** Facilitate live polls and chat interactions to maintain audience participation.

### Post-Event Tasks
*   **Data Analysis:** Review attendance numbers, engagement metrics, and feedback forms to gauge success.
*   **Archiving:** Save recordings, slide decks, and chat transcripts for future reference or rescheduling purposes.
*   **Follow-Up Communication:** Send thank-you emails and summary documents to registered attendees to reinforce value.<|im_end|>

### Pre-Event Tasks
*   **Venue Selection & Technical Setup:** Secure a reliable video conferencing platform and confirm speaker technical requirements well in advance.
*   **Registration Management:** Open registration portals and manage attendee credentials to ensure smooth check-in on the day of the event.
*   **Marketing Promotion:** Share teasers and agendas to build anticipation and drive ticket sales or sign-ups.

### Live Event Tasks
*   **Technical Support Team:** Establish a dedicated support channel to handle audio, video, and connectivity issues for participants.
*   **Moderator Coordination:** Ensure each session starts and ends on time with proper transitions between speakers.
*   **On-Screen Logistics:** Monitor the dashboard closely to manage room settings, screen sharing permissions, and Q&A moderation tools efficiently throughout the broadcasts.
*   **Real-Time Engagement:** Facilitate live polls and chat interactions to maintain audience participation.

### Post-Event Tasks
*   **Data Analysis:** Review attendance numbers, engagement metrics, and feedback forms to gauge success.
*   **Archiving:** Save recordings, slide decks, and chat transcripts for future reference or rescheduling purposes.
*   **Follow-Up Communication:** Send thank-you emails and summary documents to registered attendees to reinforce value.<|im_end|>
